_meta.description: Auto-generated silver evaluation set for NHS Shetland Annual Report 2016/17. Answers produced by the pipeline (retrieval + Ollama generation) and filtered to generation_confidence=1.0. NOT human-verified.

queries.question: What was the total net expenditure for NHS Shetland in 2016/17?
What were the total staff costs for NHS Shetland in 2016/17?
queries.expected_answer: Total staff costs for NHS Shetland in 2016/17 were £29,171k.

queries.question: What was the Core Revenue Resource Limit for NHS Shetland in 2016/17?
queries.expected_answer: The Core Revenue Resource Limit for NHS Shetland in 2016/17 was £55,081k.

queries.question: Did NHS Shetland report a surplus or deficit against its resource budget in 2016/17?
queries.expected_answer: NHS Shetland delivered an under spend against its Core Revenue Resource Limit (RRL) of £312k for 2016/17, indicating a surplus in the resource budget for ongoing activity. However, there is an underlying recurring deficit in the resource budget for ongoing activity at the close of 2016/17, standing at £1,805k up from £1,462k in 2015/16.

queries.question: What was the Cash Requirement limit for NHS Shetland in 2016/17?
queries.expected_answer: The Cash Requirement limit for NHS Shetland in 2016/17 was £56,024k.

queries.question: What was the total operating expenditure for NHS Shetland in 2016/17?
How many whole time equivalent staff did NHS Shetland employ in 2016/17?
What percentage of A&E patients were seen within 4 hours at NHS Shetland in 2016/17?
queries.expected_answer: 96.0% of patients attending the Accident and Emergency department were either discharged or admitted to a ward within four hours
